chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3174 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.20544/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection No.1 3. For order on CMA No.13851/2025 4. For hearing of main case 15.10.2025 Raja Rashid Ali advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. However, he is at liberty to file a fresh petition, if so advised, regarding upgradation, which is not part of the prayer clause. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
